name: Survey Design
description: Creates effective surveys and questionnaires to gather quantitative and qualitative data from target audiences for advertising research and consumer insights.

variables.name: research_objective
variables.description: Primary goal of the survey research

variables.name: target_audience
variables.description: Target respondent profile: demographics, behaviors, criteria

variables.name: survey_type
variables.description: Survey delivery method: online panel, phone, in-person, email

variables.name: sample_size
variables.description: Required sample size or target completion number

variables.name: key_questions
variables.description: Core questions the survey must answer
